name:
Tests that snapshot refs are deterministic and stable across page states.

   Content-hash refs use FNV-1a(role|name|tag) so the same element always
   gets the same ref regardless of what other elements exist on the page. > same page produces identical refs > refs are stable after page reload
fullName:
com.blockether.spel.snapshot-test.Tests that snapshot refs are deterministic and stable across page states.

   Content-hash refs use FNV-1a(role|name|tag) so the same element always
   gets the same ref regardless of what other elements exist on the page..same page produces identical refs.refs are stable after page reload

   Content-hash refs use FNV-1a(role|name|tag) so the same element always

labels.value: refs are stable after page reload
